price: Aber nein! Diejenigen, die ungläubig sind, befinden sich in (falschem) Stolz und in Widerstreit.
arabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ فِي عِزَّةٖ وَشِقَاقٖ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: bali alladhīna kafarū fī ʿizzatin washiqāqin
